pr.title: Non-record: Connectome-JEPA — Sparse I/O Bottleneck (val_bpb 1.7942 ± 0.003, 1.97MB artifact, first JEPA submission)

output.summary: Routes tokens through connectome-derived sparse hops with gated skips and cross-position attention while combining JEPA and SigREG losses for compact language modeling.
techniques: Connectome-derived sparse masked linear hops with gated re-injection
Cross-position causal attention layers for sequence modeling
JEPA latent prediction plus SigREG regularization added to CE loss
